description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent attached garage on the left side. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick or stone, and the roof is a dark, shingled material. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, leading to the main entryway. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several on both floors and a large window above the porch. The property includes a wide driveway and a neatly maintained lawn surrounding the house. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American suburban homes, with practical and welcoming features.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a wide driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, attached garage, and driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage extension and side windows, with the driveway extending alongside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, rear windows, and the backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side of the house, additional windows, and the driveway curving around.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, and steps leading from the driveway
